documentation.text:
@title SafeMath
 @dev Math operations with safety checks that throw on error

@title ERC20 interface
 @dev see https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/issues/20

@title Basic token
 @dev Basic version of StandardToken, with no allowances.

@dev The Ownable constructor sets the original `owner` of the contract to the sender
 account.
@dev Throws if called by any account other than the owner.

@dev Allows the current owner to transfer control of the contract to a newOwner.
 @param newOwner The address to transfer ownership to.

@title Pausable
 @dev Base contract which allows children to implement an emergency stop mechanism.
@dev modifier to allow actions only when the contract IS paused
@dev modifier to allow actions only when the contract IS NOT paused
@dev called by the owner to pause, triggers stopped state
@dev called by the owner to unpause, returns to normal state

Pausable token
 Simple ERC20 Token example, with pausable token creation*

@title REP2 Token
 @dev REP2 Mintable Token with migration from legacy contract

@dev Creates a new RepToken instance
 @param _legacyRepContract Address of the legacy ERC20Basic REP contract to migrate balances from
@dev Unpauses the contract with the caveat added that it can only happen after initialization.

devdoc.details: REP2 Mintable Token with migration from legacy contract

allowance(address,address).details: Function to check the amount of tokens that an owner allowed to a spender.

params._owner: address The address which owns the funds.
params._spender: address The address which will spend the funds.

returns.remaining: A uint256 specifing the amount of tokens still avaible for the spender.

approve(address,uint256).details: Aprove the passed address to spend the specified amount of tokens on behalf of msg.sender.

params._spender: The address which will spend the funds.
params._value: The amount of tokens to be spent.

balanceOf(address).details: Gets the balance of the specified address.

params._owner: The address to query the the balance of.

returns.balance: An uint256 representing the amount owned by the passed address.

params._legacyRepContract: Address of the legacy ERC20Basic REP contract to migrate balances from

migrateBalance(address).details: Copies the balance of a single addresses from the legacy contract

returns._0: True if balance was copied, false if was already copied or address had no balance

migrateBalances(address[]).details: Copies the balance of a batch of addresses from the legacy contract

params._holders: Array of addresses to migrate balance

pause().details: called by the owner to pause, triggers stopped state

transferFrom(address,address,uint256).details: Transfer tokens from one address to another

params._from: address The address which you want to send tokens from
params._to: address The address which you want to transfer to
params._value: uint256 the amout of tokens to be transfered

transferOwnership(address).details: Allows the current owner to transfer control of the contract to a newOwner.

params.newOwner: The address to transfer ownership to.

unpause().details: Unpauses the contract with the caveat added that it can only happen after initialization.

devdoc.title: REP2 Token
